title: Full Stack Developer
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a talented Full Stack Developer to join our growing team. You will be responsible for developing both frontend and backend components of our web applications.

Requirements:

  • 3+ years of experience in web development
  • Proficiency in JavaScript, Python, and SQL
  • Experience with React and Node.js
  • Knowledge of database design and API development

Nice to Have:

  • Experience with Docker and Kubernetes
  • Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, GCP)
  • Previous startup experience

Benefits:

  • Competitive salary: $90,000 - $130,000
  • Health insurance and dental coverage
  • Remote work flexibility
  • Professional development budget

Join us in building the next generation of web applications!
